name: Erasure
bio: Erasure continue to earn through synth-pop playlist strength, loyal catalog listening, and durable alternative-pop recognition.
notable_for: Synth-pop songs that remain highly replayable across nostalgia and alternative playlists.
career_highlight: Their best-known tracks still hold steady long-tail value decades after release.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and synth-pop playlists support recurring plays.
Dedicated fan listening helps stabilize long-tail catalog value.
Media reuse and retrospective programming renew attention.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Erasure's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Erasure's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
